name: Mito-Frail MitoQ frail older-adult registry
summary: Recruiting phase 2 MitoQ registry in frail older adults with vasodilation, mobility, and cognitive-performance endpoints and no posted results.
population: Frail older adults with vasodilation, mobility, and cognitive-performance endpoints

trial_details.expected_results_window: Estimated completion is Feb. 1, 2028; no posted results were present in the Jun. 8, 2026 API view.
trial_details.horizon_note: This is direct MitoQ frailty and function trial-watch context.
trial_details.why_it_matters: Results could clarify whether NAD or redox-restoration programs translate biomarker target engagement into prespecified function, physiology, safety, or disease-boundary outcomes.
